languages.text: "Еще есть руины какие-то, нелюдские. Мы там редко бываем, нечего приличному человеку там делать. Дунавски спросите, она когда звание капитан-интенданта получала, походом к ним ходила".

traits.locale_text: "Еще есть руины какие-то, нелюдские. Мы там редко бываем, нечего приличному человеку там делать. Старики вообще их порогом смерти называли. Дунавски спросите, она когда звание капитан-интенданта получала, походом к ним ходила".

languages.text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."
languages.original_text: "Еще есть руины какие-то, нелюдские. Мы там редко бываем, нечего приличному человеку там делать. Дунавски спросите, она когда звание капитан-интенданта получала, походом к ним ходила".

traits.locale_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski, When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

"There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski, When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

"There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

"There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

"There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

languages.text: "Es gibt auch einige Ruinen, die nicht von Menschen geschaffen wurden. Wir suchen sie nur selten auf. Ein anständiger Mann hat an einem solchen Ort nichts zu schaffen. Fragt Dunawski. Als sie für den Posten der Captain-Quartiermeisterin gehandelt wurde, führte sie eine Expedition zu diesen Ruinen an."
languages.original_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt auch einige Ruinen, die nicht von Menschen geschaffen wurden. Wir suchen sie nur selten auf. Ein anständiger Mann hat an einem solchen Ort nichts zu schaffen. Fragt Dunawski. Als sie für den Posten der Captain-Quartiermeisterin gehandelt wurde, führte sie eine Expedition zu diesen Ruinen an."

languages.text: « Il y a aussi des ruines qui ne sont visiblement pas de facture humaine. Nous y allons rarement. Un honnête homme n'a rien à faire dans un endroit pareil. Demandez plutôt à Dunawski. Elle a mené une expédition là-bas, du temps où elle briguait le poste de capitaine-quartier-maître. »
languages.original_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

traits.locale_text: « Il y a aussi des ruines qui ne sont visiblement pas de facture humaine. Nous y allons rarement. Un honnête homme n'a rien à faire dans un endroit pareil. Demandez plutôt à Dunawski. Elle a mené une expédition là-bas, du temps où elle briguait le poste de capitaine-quartier-maître. »

languages.text: «También hay unas ruinas que no fueron obra de manos humanas. Casi nunca las visitamos; a las personas decentes no se les ha perdido nada por allí. Pregúntele a Dunawski, dirigió una expedición a esas ruinas para defender su candidatura a capitana intendente».
languages.original_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

traits.locale_text: «También hay unas ruinas que no fueron obra de manos humanas. Casi nunca las visitamos; a las personas decentes no se les ha perdido nada por allí. Pregúntele a Dunawski, dirigió una expedición a esas ruinas para defender su candidatura a capitana intendente».

languages.text: "Ayrıca insan eliyle yapılmamış bazı harabeler var. Nadiren gideriz. Düzgün bir adamın böyle yerlerde işi olmaz. Dunawski'ye sorun. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, subay terfisi için sıradayken harabeleri keşfe gitmişti."
languages.original_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

traits.locale_text: "Ayrıca insan eliyle yapılmamış bazı harabeler var. Nadiren gideriz. Düzgün bir adamın böyle yerlerde işi olmaz. Dunawski'ye sorun. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, subay terfisi için sıradayken harabeleri keşfe gitmişti."

languages.text: “还有一些遗迹，不是人类建造的。我们很少去那里。正经人不该去那种地方。去问问杜纳芙斯卡吧。她当年为了升任军需官上尉，曾带远征队去过那片遗迹。”
languages.original_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

traits.locale_text: “还有一些遗迹，不是人类建造的。我们很少去那里。正经人不该去那种地方。去问问杜纳芙斯卡吧。她当年为了升任军需官上尉，曾带远征队去过那片遗迹。”

languages.text: 「人間の手で造られたものではない遺跡もある。私たちは滅多に行かない。良い男はそんな場所に行く必要はない。ダナウスキーに聞いてごらん。彼女は艦長昇進の候補として、その遺跡に調査隊を率いた。」
languages.original_text: "There are also some ruins, not made by human hands. We rarely go there. A decent man has no business in such a place. Ask Dunawski. When she was up for her promotion to captain-quartermaster, she led an expedition to those ruins."

traits.locale_text: 「人間の手で造られたものではない遺跡もある。私たちは滅多に行かない。良い男はそんな場所に行く必要はない。ダナウスキーに聞いてごらん。彼女は艦長昇進の候補として、その遺跡に調査隊を率いた。」
